§8

Executive Summary

As of 04-Jun-2026 14:34, the external laboratory workload stands at 4,339 total test items across 01–04 June 2026. Of these, 1,945 tests (44.8%) have reached final sign-off. The remaining 2,394 tests constitute active pending workload.

The verification team must act on 238 resulted-but-unverified tests (31 exceeding 48 h) and 788 VerifiedLevel1 tests awaiting Level 2 sign-off (435 exceeding 48 h) — a combined queue of 1,026 tests. On the pre-analytical side, 997 ordered tests have no specimen on record (724 past the 24 h mark). Three samples require immediate re-collection after rejection. 235 orders are partially complete, potentially delaying clinical reporting. Priority: clear the resulted-unverified queue first, then escalate Level-2-pending items to the senior verifier roster.
Al-Majardah General Hospital — External Laboratory
